events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming during the feeder pull is treated as an installed-defective condition requiring the affected raceway to be halted, pull calculations reviewed, conductors inspected and megger-tested, damaged runs re-pulled/replaced, and conductor identification (NEC 200.6/210.5) verified before close-out — hence `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, at 70% complete.
